title: Create Water Goal
description: Creates or updates a user's daily water consumption goal.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Target water goal in the format X.X in the unit system that corresponds to the locale.

response_fields.name: goal : goal
response_fields.description: Amount of water to consume daily in the units specified by the Accept-Language header.
